title: Finalize review readiness only after stabilization and final status checks
outOfScope: Changing unrelated Work Item lifecycle or archive behavior
Changing product code or external CI provider configuration

sources.reason: Defines Work Item 6 sequencing and failure-safety requirements.
Current finish orchestration and Readiness promotion.

riskAssessment.reason: Finish ordering is lifecycle-critical: a failed stabilization step must not leave a persisted positive Readiness state.

executionDecision.reason: The user authorized the complete Work Item execution loop; the change is bounded to finish/readiness orchestration and its tests.

preReviewWarnings: Review that every stabilization failure persists not_ready and that Readiness is promoted only after final Summary and Status checks.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: A1: Readiness is promoted only after declared verification, stabilization, final Summary validation, final status generation, and final status consistency succeed.
A2: Any stabilization or final validation failure persists reviewReadiness.status as not_ready and does not leave stale positive Readiness.
A3: Regression tests cover successful promotion and failure after Readiness would otherwise be positive.

scenarioCoverage.reason: Positive Readiness is allowed only at the end of the successful finish pipeline.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: A stabilization check fails after declared verification
scenarioCoverage.reason: Failure must persist not_ready and prevent stale positive state.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Final Summary or status consistency validation fails
scenarioCoverage.reason: The final lifecycle gate must remain fail-closed.

guidelines: Keep Readiness promotion fail-closed and do not persist a positive state before all final checks pass.
Preserve existing finish command evidence and status generation compatibility while changing only orchestration order.
Keep tests deterministic and do not mutate external release or repository state.

intent.problem: ai-finish currently writes a positive reviewReadiness before self-referential stabilization checks complete, so a later failure can leave an inconsistent Summary claiming readiness.
constraints: Declared verification must remain the first gate.
Stabilization, final Summary validation, status generation, and status consistency must all pass before positive Readiness is persisted.
A failure must leave the Work Item not_ready and retain useful failure evidence.
intent.rationale: Moving Readiness promotion to the end of the finish pipeline makes the persisted Summary and generated Status reflect only a fully verified lifecycle state.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized the complete implementation loop, including governance scripts, tests, documentation where scoped, PR merge, and lifecycle cleanup.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
